subject: Physics
chapter: Semiconductor Electronics: Materials, Devices and Simple Circuits

remember: Students will be able to define the terms related to semiconductor electronics.
Students will be able to identify the types of semiconductors and their applications.
Students will be able to recall the properties of semiconductor materials.
understand: Students will be able to explain the formation of p-n junction and its characteristics.
Students will be able to describe the working of a semiconductor diode.
Students will be able to understand the concept of biasing and its importance in semiconductor devices.
apply: Students will be able to calculate the current-voltage characteristics of a semiconductor diode.
Students will be able to determine the resistance and capacitance of a semiconductor device.
Students will be able to apply the concept of semiconductor devices in simple circuits.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the characteristics of a transistor and its application in amplifiers.
Students will be able to compare the advantages and disadvantages of different types of semiconductor devices.
Students will be able to evaluate the performance of a semiconductor device in a given circuit.

ncert_objectives: As per NCERT objective 1: To understand the characteristics of semiconductor materials and devices.
As per NCERT objective 2: To learn about the formation and characteristics of p-n junction diode.
As per NCERT objective 3: To study the working of a transistor and its application in amplifiers.
board_exam_objectives: To test the understanding of semiconductor materials and devices.
To evaluate the ability to analyze and apply the concepts of semiconductor electronics in simple circuits.
To assess the knowledge of characteristics and applications of different types of semiconductor devices.
